missing_fields.message: Missing delivery.delivery_time_value; keep as null and optionally fall back to OCR/UI text.

notes: If any field is null, use decoded_raw_text regex fallback or OCR from screenshot.
For app_location captures that are text-transformed, seller and exact prices may be incomplete.
